title: P12K safe script rewrite workflow
objective:
Run script:"""from pathlib import Path
p=Path('.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml')
p.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
p.write_text('name: Governance Validation CI

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  disabled:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Disabled
        run: echo "Governance Validation CI disabled. Enable after BEM-1285."
',encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
"""No issue comments.
